pageContext.name: Ultramarines Primaris Captain Sidonicus
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Joytoy proudly present the Ultramarines Primaris Captain Sidonicus 1:18 Scale Collectible Figure!  Captains are fearless leaders among the Space Marines, each one a masterful tactician and skilled warrior armed with a variety of weapons and equipment. Clad in a suit of heavy Gravis armor, a Captain can fearlessly stride into the very fiercest battlefield firestorms. From Warhammer 40,000 comes a warrior clad in decorative blue armor!  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your Warhammer 40k collection today!
